{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Abidan panel
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Penance arrow]] hit an [[Abidan panel]] of blue light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
